<!-- Thanks for contributing to KAEOS! Keep this light — delete sections that don't apply. -->

## What & why
Briefly, what does this change and why?

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests / CI

## How it was tested
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes (backend)
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run build` pass (frontend)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] Ran the relevant part of the E2E suite (note which)

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or real customer data in the diff
- [ ] Tenant-scoped queries filter by `tenant_id` (and don't rely on RLS alone)
- [ ] I have the right to submit this under Apache 2.0 (inbound = outbound — see CONTRIBUTING; no CLA to sign)

## Notes for reviewers
Anything that needs extra eyes, trade-offs you made, or follow-ups.
